options.name: -cond
options.description: The condition only if the library has a condition attached to the specified timing check arc

options.name: -fall
options.description: Data fall transition for the timing check

options.name: -from
options.description: Start points of the timing arcs for which checks are annotated

options.name: -hold
options.description: Sets timing check type to hold

options.name: -max
options.description: Maximum timing check for both data rise and data fall transitions

options.name: -min
options.description: Minimum timing check for both data rise and data fall transitions

options.name: -nochange_high
options.description: Sets timing check type to nochange_high

options.name: -nochange_low
options.description: Sets timing check type to nochange_low

options.name: -recovery
options.description: Sets timing check type to recovery

options.name: -removal
options.description: Sets timing check type to removal

options.name: -rise
options.description: Data rise transition for the timing check

options.name: -setup
options.description: Sets timing check type to setup

options.name: -to
options.description: Endpoints of the timing arcs for which checks are annotated
